name: semver-release-recommender-skill
description: Codex skill for analyzing release changes and recommending a semantic version bump.
author: Nick2bad4u <20943337+Nick2bad4u@users.noreply.github.com> (https://github.com/Nick2bad4u)

scripts.publish:local: npm run release:verify && npm publish --access public
scripts.release:verify: npm run validate && npm run pack:dry-run
scripts.update-deps: npx ncu -i --install never && npm update --force && npm install --force
scripts.validate: node tools/validate-skill-package.mjs && python -c "from pathlib import Path; compile(Path('scripts/analyze_release_semver.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8'), 'scripts/analyze_release_semver.py', 'exec')" && npm run test
scripts.check:python: npm run lint:python && npm run typecheck:python && npm run test:python && python -m compileall -q -x "[\\/]\." scripts tests
scripts.check:python:unsafe: npm run lint:python:unsafe && npm run typecheck:python && npm run test:python && python -m compileall -q -x "[\\/]\." scripts tests
scripts.coverage:python: python -c "from pathlib import Path; Path('coverage/pytest').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True); Path('coverage/python').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)" && coverage run -m pytest --junitxml=coverage/pytest/junit.xml && coverage xml && coverage report
scripts.format:python: npm run ruff:format && npm run ruff:fix
scripts.lint:python: npm run ruff:check && npm run ruff:format:check
scripts.lint:python:unsafe: npm run ruff:check:unsafe && npm run ruff:fix:unsafe
scripts.python:venv: python -m venv .venv && .venv\Scripts\activate && python -m pip install --upgrade pip && python -m pip install -r requirements-dev.txt
